svg.title: Rewrite readiness diagnostic — three questions determining whether an organisation is ready to begin an AI-assisted rewrite
svg.desc: Three sequential yes/no questions flowing downward. Each No routes left to an invest-here-first box. Three Yes answers lead to the final proceed node.

g.text: Can you state your domain invariants
Do you know why your architecture

svg.text: Any "No" means the rewrite will reproduce the same problems faster.
Build the preconditions first. They will serve every future iteration.
